event: received 10 fractions of palliative RT to the vagina
impingement of vaginal vault mass on both the ureters
oxygen saturation was 89% on room air
purple urinary bag in one of the percutaneous nephrostomy (PCN) stents
high white blood cell count of 16,760/mm3
tested positive for nitrates and leucocyte esterase
started on empirical IV cefoperazone and sulbactam combination
urine culture grew a mixture of organisms, namely Escherichia coli >105 CFU/mL and Klebsiella spp.
clinically the patient showed no improvement
advanced nature of the disease and poor prognosis
decided for no aggressive treatment and preferred only palliative intent
delirious with increased breathlessness and fever spikes
expired a day after her discharge
